title: Street of Sin
director: Mauritz Stiller, Ludwig Berger, Lothar Mendes
writer: Benjamin Glazer, Julian Johnson, Chandler Sprague
actors: Emil Jannings, Fay Wray, Olga Baclanova
plot: The story is set in the seamy Soho section of London, where burglar Basher Bill shares bed and board with his sluttish girlfriend Annie. As wicked as they come, Bill softens when he meets virtuous Salvation Army lass Elizabeth.
